title: Lesson 294: 滑る, 滑る, 隅...

items.gloss: to glide; to slide (e.g. on skis); to slip; to fail (an examination); to bomb (when telling a joke); to drop; to go down; to come down; to fall (e.g. in status)
to be slippery; to be slimy; to behave charmingly; to walk merrily
corner; nook; recess; downstage right (on a noh stage)
to finish; to end; to be completed; to merely result in something less severe than expected; to feel at ease; to feel unease or guilt for troubling someone; to be sorry
